title: rubus × obrotundatus
intro: Rubus × obrotundatus, also known as the hybrid raspberry, is a cross between the species Rubus idaeus and Rubus fruticosus, resulting in a plant that combines the characteristics of both parents. The plant is primarily used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Rubus × obrotundatus include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and support the immune system. The plant can be prepared into various herbal preparations, such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, to utilize its medicinal properties and provide health benefits.
